title.en: An incredible night when England heroes were made
title.zh-CN: 英格兰英雄诞生的美妙夜晚

summary.en: On a spine-tingling night of drama, emotion and pure theatre in one of sport's most atmospheric arenas, England delivered one of their greatest performances.
summary.zh-CN: 在一个充满戏剧、情感和纯粹戏剧的激动人心的夜晚，在体育界最具氛围的舞台上，英格兰表演了他们最伟大的表演之一。

title.en: Henderson injures wrist in England celebrations
title.zh-CN: 亨德森在英格兰庆祝活动中手腕受伤

summary.en: England midfielder Jordan Henderson suffered a "really bad" while celebrating his side's World Cup win over Mexico, head coach Thomas Tuchel says.
summary.zh-CN: 主教练托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）说，英格兰中场乔丹·亨德森（ Jordan Henderson ）在庆祝他的球队赢得墨西哥世界杯时遭遇了“非常糟糕的

title.en: Tuchel criticises Fifa over Balogun - where does this end?
title.zh-CN: Tuchel在Balogun上批评国际足联-这会在哪里结束？

summary.en: England coach Thomas Tuchel says there is total confusion over the disciplinary process after Fifa's shock decision not to ban Folarin Balogun.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰教练托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）表示，在国际足联做出不禁止Folarin Balogun的震惊决定后，纪律程序完全混乱。

title.en: England win epic tie against Mexico to reach quarter-finals
title.zh-CN: 英格兰队赢得与墨西哥队的史诗并列，进入四分之一决赛

summary.en: Jude Bellingham scores twice and Harry Kane converts a penalty as 10-man England beat Mexico 3-2 in the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 裘德·贝林汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）得分两次，哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）在世界杯上以10人英格兰队3-2击败墨西哥队

title.en: Neymar says Brazil career over after Norway defeat
title.zh-CN: 内马尔表示，在挪威失利后，巴西的职业生涯结束了

summary.en: An emotional Neymar says his international career for Brazil is "over" following his side's exit at the 2026 World Cup at the hands of Norway.
summary.zh-CN: 情绪激动的内马尔表示，在他的球队在挪威手中退出2026年世界杯之后，他在巴西的国际生涯已经“结束”。

title.en: How Mexico's World Cup run brought joy after a year of fear
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥世界杯在经历了一年的恐惧后如何带来欢乐

summary.en: For Mexico's football-loving community, the World Cup has been a triumph, despite their last-16 exit. The joy has spread to Southern California, home to one of the largest Mexican communities outside...
summary.zh-CN: 对于热爱足球的墨西哥社区来说，世界杯是一次胜利，尽管他们在过去16场比赛中退出。欢乐已经蔓延到南加州，这里是外面最大的墨西哥社区之一……

title.en: Red card system in disarray over Trump, Fifa and Balogun decision
title.zh-CN: 红牌系统因特朗普、国际足联和巴洛根的决定而陷入混乱

summary.en: The decision to effectively overturn the red card shown to United States forward Folarin Balogun leaves many unanswered questions.
summary.zh-CN: 有效地推翻向美国前锋Folarin Balogun展示的红牌的决定留下了许多悬而未决的问题。

title.en: 'Iconic match at iconic stadium' - England win down to 'pure will'
title.zh-CN: “标志性体育场的标志性比赛” -英格兰赢得“纯粹意志”

summary.en: England are praised for showing "heart and belief" as they beat Mexico in an "iconic match at an iconic stadium" to reach the World Cup quarter-finals.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队因在“标志性体育场的标志性比赛”中击败墨西哥队进入世界杯四分之一决赛而受到称赞。

title.en: Quiz: Name every team England have played in a World Cup quarter-final
title.zh-CN: 测验：列出英格兰队参加过世界杯四分之一决赛的每一支球队

summary.en: Norway will be the 11th team England will have faced in a World Cup quarter-final - so can you name the other 10?
summary.zh-CN: 挪威将成为英格兰队在世界杯四分之一决赛中面对的第11支球队，那么你能说出其他10支球队的名字吗？

title.en: Who has been eliminated from the World Cup?

summary.en: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team lists the full set of nations who have been eliminated from the 2026 World Cup so far
summary.zh-CN: BBC Sport的Ask Me Anything团队列出了迄今为止被2026年世界杯淘汰的全部国家

title.en: Family travels 6,500 miles to see son play 13 minutes at World Cup
title.zh-CN: 全家旅行6500英里，观看儿子在世界杯上打13分钟的比赛

summary.en: Callan Elliot's family flew thousands of miles to see their son - originally from Annan - play for New Zealand.
summary.zh-CN: 卡兰·埃利奥特（ Callan Elliot ）的家人飞了数千英里去看他们的儿子（最初来自安南）为新西兰比赛。

title.en: Jude's attitude can never be questioned again after colossal Mexico display
title.zh-CN: 在巨大的墨西哥展览之后，裘德的态度再也不会受到质疑

summary.en: There aren't enough superlatives to describe what Jude Bellingham produced in the cauldron that was the Azteca.
summary.zh-CN: 裘德·贝灵汉（ Jude Bellingham ）在阿兹台克（ Azteca ）大锅中制作的东西没有足够的最高级描述。

title.en: Ref Watch: Quansah's red card and penalty against Kane analysed
title.zh-CN: 参考观看：分析了Quansah的红牌和对Kane的点球

title.en: 'Not good enough!' Tuchel fumes at refs after 'heroic' England win
title.zh-CN: “还不够好！”在“英雄”英格兰队获胜后，图谢尔在裁判席上冒烟

summary.en: Thomas Tuchel hit out at officials and praised England's "heroic" performance in their thrilling 3-2 win over Mexico in the World Cup last 16.
summary.zh-CN: 托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）对官员进行了抨击，并称赞英格兰队在过去16年世界杯上以惊心动魄的3-2战胜墨西哥的“英雄”表现。

title.en: 'Crossed a red line': UEFA hits out at FIFA call to allow banned Balogun to play
title.zh-CN: “越过红线” ：欧足联在国际足联电话会议上允许被禁止的Balogun参加比赛

summary.en: UEFA says FIFA has "crossed a red line" and has put the "integrity of the game at stake" in allowing USA striker Folarin Balogun to play in their World Cup tie against Belgium on Tuesday.
summary.zh-CN: 欧足联表示，国际足联已经“越过了红线” ，并已将“比赛的完整性置于危险之中” ，允许美国前锋Folarin Balogun在周二对阵比利时的世界杯比赛中发挥作用。
